name: 2026-05-16 — 2026-05-16_Cisco-SDWAN-vHub-AuthBypass-UAT8616
description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN vHub authentication bypass — CVE-2026-20182, UAT-8616 targeted exploitation, and ten post-compromise activity clusters — clusters: UAT-8616, Talos Cluster 1 (Tas9er Godzilla), Talos Cluster 2 (Behinder Base64), Talos Cluster 3 (XenShell + Behinder), Talos Cluster 4 (Godzilla variant), Talos Cluster 5 (AdaptixC2 shadowcore), Talos Cluster 6 (Sliver mTLS), Talos Cluster 7 (XMRig + Cobalt Strike), Talos Cluster 8 (NimPlant-variant agent1), Talos Cluster 9 (gsocket + XMRig), Talos Cluster 10 (vManage credential extractor)
